notes: Curated overrides for high-use scripts. Leave most scripts auto-classified; add entries only when category/summary quality matters.

overrides.name: check_infra.py
overrides.summary: Pre-run infrastructure readiness checker (tokens, Docker, disk, Harbor CLI).

overrides.name: validate_tasks_preflight.py
overrides.summary: Pre-flight task validator (static checks plus optional no-agent runtime smoke).

overrides.name: aggregate_status.py
overrides.summary: Scans run directories, classifies task status, and supports watch mode for active runs.

overrides.name: validate_task_run.py
overrides.summary: Post-run validation for a run/task output directory (`result.json`, scoring, anomalies).

overrides.name: status_fingerprints.py
overrides.summary: Known failure regex fingerprints used by status/triage tooling.

overrides.name: repo_health.py
overrides.summary: Repo health gate that runs required pre-commit/push checks (docs drift, selection file, task preflight).

overrides.name: docs_consistency_check.py
overrides.summary: Validates documentation references, agent-guide sync/size budgets, and generated navigation artifacts.

overrides.name: compare_configs.py
overrides.summary: Compares benchmark outcomes across configs on matched task sets.

overrides.name: mcp_audit.py
overrides.summary: Audits MCP tool usage patterns and reward/time deltas across runs.

overrides.name: ir_analysis.py
overrides.summary: Runs retrieval/IR analysis over normalized events and evaluation outputs.

overrides.name: cost_report.py
overrides.summary: Aggregates token and cost metrics per run, suite, and config.

overrides.name: generate_manifest.py
overrides.summary: Rebuilds `MANIFEST.json` from on-disk run results.

overrides.name: generate_eval_report.py
overrides.summary: Builds the deterministic aggregate evaluation report for completed runs.

overrides.name: sync_task_metadata.py
overrides.summary: Reconciles `task.toml` metadata with the canonical task selection registry (`--fix` to apply changes).

overrides.name: promote_run.py
overrides.summary: Promotes a staged run into the official results flow with integrity checks.

overrides.name: rerun_failed.py
overrides.summary: Generates targeted rerun commands for failed tasks (despite `rerun_` prefix, this is part of normal ops).

overrides.name: generate_script_registry.py
overrides.summary: Generates `scripts/registry.json`, the machine-readable script inventory used for agent navigation.

overrides.name: generate_script_index.py
overrides.summary: Generates `docs/ops/SCRIPT_INDEX.md` from `scripts/registry.json`.

overrides.name: sync_agent_guides.py
overrides.summary: Syncs generated root/local `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md` files from canonical sources in `docs/ops/`.

overrides.name: refresh_agent_navigation.py
overrides.summary: One-command refresh/check for generated agent-navigation artifacts (guides + script registry/index).
